description: Google Cloud Customer Care is Google Cloud’s support service for managing technical support cases and related support interactions. The Cloud Support API lets customers create, view, update, and manage support cases and related attachments, comments, and event subscriptions.
summary: Google Cloud Customer Care for cloudsupport.googleapis.com exposes a REST Cloud Support API at `https://cloudsupport.googleapis.com` authenticated with Google OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens, plus a public MCP endpoint at `https://cloudsupport.googleapis.com/mcp` with no credential required.
